svg.text: Radio Oracle — Jetson Orin Nano Schematic
BCM pin numbering · header position in parentheses · reference designators match netlist.md

g.text: ADDR → GND (or floating) for I²C addr 0x48
+3V3 — J1.1 → RV1.CW → U1.VDD → LED1 anode (common) → R4 → R5
GND — J1.6 → SW1.t2 → SW2.t2 → RV1.CCW → U1.GND
A1 — SW2.t1 + R4 → U1.A1 (idle ≈ 3.3 V; closed → 0 V → device on)
A2 — SW1.t1 + R5 → U1.A2 (idle ≈ 3.3 V; pressed → 0 V)
BCM 23/24/25 — J1.16/18/22 → R1/R2/R3 → LED1 R/G/B cathodes (LOW = lit)
net flag — same name = same wire
